name: GIGABYTE W480 VISION W ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel W480 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4400(OC) - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 NVMe PCIe x4 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - HDMI - 2x DisplayPort - Dual Intel LAN w/ cFosSpeed - Optical S/PDIF Out
shortName: GIGABYTE W480 VISION W ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1200 - Intel W480
description: Gigabyte W480 VISION W ATX workstation motherboard with quad PCIe slots and dual LAN for professional use.
